name: MCP4728 Component
description: The MCP4728 output component exposes 4 MCP4728 channels of a global [MCP4728](https://esphome.io/components/output/mcp4728#mcp4728-component) as float outputs.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the MCP4728 chain of this output component. One of `A`, `B`, `C` or `D`.

config_entries.label: Mcp4728 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [MCP4728](https://esphome.io/components/output/mcp4728#mcp4728-component). Use this if you have multiple MCP4728 chains you want to use at the same time.

config_entries.label: Gain
config_entries.description: Chose the GAIN multiplier for internal VREF. One of `X1` or `X2`. Only useful when `vdd=internal`. Defaults to `X1`.

config_entries.label: Power Down
config_entries.description: Chose the power down mode. In power down mode (value different from `normal`  ) the output pin will be connected to GND using a resistor (1kOhm, 100kOhm or 500kOhm). One of `normal`, `gnd_1k`, `gnd_100k` or `gnd_500k`. Defaults to `normal`.

config_entries.label: Vref
config_entries.description: Chose the VREF source. One of `vdd` or `internal`. Defaults to `vdd`.
